To connect Greenhouse, you need OAuth2 c:
To connect Greenhouse, you need OAuth2 credentials from a registered Greenhouse partner application.

**Steps to get credentials:**
1. Contact **partner-support@greenhouse.io** to register your integration.
2. Provide: integration name, required scopes, and your redirect URI.
3. Greenhouse will issue a **Client ID** and **Client Secret**.

**Required scopes:** `harvest:candidates:list`, `harvest:candidates:create`, `harvest:candidates:update`, `harvest:applications:list`, `harvest:jobs:list`, `harvest:job_posts:list`, `harvest:interviews:list`, `harvest:scorecards:list`, `harvest:notes:create`
Creates a new candidate profile in Green: Creates a new candidate profile in Greenhouse.
Adds a note to an existing candidate pro: Adds a note to an existing candidate profile in Greenhouse.
Creates a new prospect in Greenhouse — a: Creates a new prospect in Greenhouse — a person who has not yet applied to a specific job.
Updates an existing candidate profile in: Updates an existing candidate profile in Greenhouse. Only fields you provide will be changed.
Searches for a candidate in Greenhouse b: Searches for a candidate in Greenhouse by email address. Returns the first match.
Searches for a candidate by email addres: Searches for a candidate by email address. If no match is found, creates a new candidate profile instead.
Retrieves the full details of a scorecar: Retrieves the full details of a scorecard by its ID. Use with the New Scorecard Due trigger to look up the scorecard that fired the flow.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
The type of email address provided.
The type of phone number provided.
URL to the candidate's LinkedIn profile: URL to the candidate's LinkedIn profile (e.g. `https://linkedin.com/in/johndoe`).
URL to the candidate's personal website: URL to the candidate's personal website or portfolio.
Labels to attach to this candidate (e.g. `referral`, `engineering`). Each item in the list becomes one tag.
The numeric ID of the candidate to add t: The numeric ID of the candidate to add the note to. Found in the candidate URL in Greenhouse (e.g. `https://app.greenhouse.io/people/**123456**`), or mapped from a previous **Create Candidate** step.
The type of note to create.
Who can see this note. **Admin Only** —: Who can see this note. **Admin Only** — only admins; **Private** — only the author; **Public** — all Greenhouse users.
Optional. The Greenhouse user ID to attr: Optional. The Greenhouse user ID to attribute this note to. To find it: go to **Configure → Users**, click a user, and copy the number from the URL (e.g. `https://app.greenhouse.io/people/**12345**`).
URL to the prospect's LinkedIn profile (: URL to the prospect's LinkedIn profile (e.g. `https://linkedin.com/in/johndoe`).
URL to the prospect's personal website o: URL to the prospect's personal website or portfolio.
Labels to attach to this prospect (e.g. `referral`, `engineering`). Each item in the list becomes one tag.
The numeric ID of the candidate to updat: The numeric ID of the candidate to update. Found in the candidate URL in Greenhouse (e.g. `https://app.greenhouse.io/people/**123456**`), or mapped from a previous **Create Candidate** step.
Updated first name for the candidate.
Updated last name for the candidate.
Updated email address. This replaces the: Updated email address. This replaces the candidate's primary email.
The type of the updated email address.
Updated phone number. This replaces the: Updated phone number. This replaces the candidate's primary phone.
The type of the updated phone number.
Updated personal website or portfolio UR: Updated personal website or portfolio URL.
Replaces all existing tags on the candid: Replaces all existing tags on the candidate with this list. Leave blank to keep existing tags unchanged.
The email address to search for. Returns: The email address to search for. Returns the first candidate whose profile contains this address.
The email address to search for. If a ca: The email address to search for. If a candidate with this address already exists, they will be returned as-is.
Required when creating a new candidate. Ignored if a match is found.
The type of email address. Used only whe: The type of email address. Used only when creating a new candidate.
Phone number to set on the new candidate: Phone number to set on the new candidate. Ignored if a match is found.
The type of phone number. Used only when: The type of phone number. Used only when creating a new candidate.
Current employer to set on the new candi: Current employer to set on the new candidate. Ignored if a match is found.
Current job title to set on the new cand: Current job title to set on the new candidate. Ignored if a match is found.
LinkedIn profile URL to set on the new c: LinkedIn profile URL to set on the new candidate (e.g. `https://linkedin.com/in/johndoe`). Ignored if a match is found.
Personal website or portfolio URL to set: Personal website or portfolio URL to set on the new candidate. Ignored if a match is found.
Tags to attach to the new candidate. Ign: Tags to attach to the new candidate. Ignored if a match is found.
The numeric ID of the scorecard to retri: The numeric ID of the scorecard to retrieve. Typically mapped from a **New Scorecard Due** trigger step.
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
HEAD: HEAD
Triggers when a new application is submi: Triggers when a new application is submitted by a candidate.
Triggers when a candidate is hired.
Triggers when a new job post is created.
Triggers when an existing job is updated: Triggers when an existing job is updated.
Triggers when a new scheduled interview: Triggers when a new scheduled interview is created within the configured time window.
Triggers when a new scorecard is due — i: Triggers when a new scorecard is due — i.e. created but not yet submitted by the interviewer.
Only trigger for interviews scheduled to: Only trigger for interviews scheduled to start within this many days from now. For example, `7` means only interviews starting within the next week will fire this trigger.
